title: Settings
countryDescription: Tax rules and rates are specific to your country. Auto-detected from your browser locale.
languageDescription: Choose the display language for the application.

data.title: Your Data
data.exportDescription: Download all your data (account info, tax calculations, transactions) as a JSON file.
data.exportError: Failed to download data. Please try again.

dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.deleteDescription: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
dangerZone.confirmDescription: This will permanently delete your account, all saved calculations, and all uploaded data. Type DELETE below to confirm.
dangerZone.deleteError: Failed to delete account. Please try again.
